theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose a light, dark, or system-matched interface.

option_tooltips.auto: Follow the operating system light or dark preference.

accent_color.label: Accent Color
accent_color.description: Highlight color used for active controls, selected tracks, and branding.

audio_quality.label: Audio Quality
audio_quality.description: Target MP3 bitrate. Audio.io chooses the closest available source quality and stores the actual output quality.

max_workers.label: Concurrent Downloads
max_workers.description: How many playlist items can download at the same time.

auto_cull_orphan_files.label: Clean Orphan Files
auto_cull_orphan_files.description: Remove audio and thumbnail files that are no longer in the database when Audio.io starts.

auto_redownload_missing.label: Repair Missing Files
auto_redownload_missing.description: Re-download database tracks whose audio or thumbnail files are missing when Audio.io starts.

youtube_cookies.label: YouTube Cookies
youtube_cookies.description: Upload cookies.txt when YouTube blocks downloads. Audio.io will use it automatically for future imports.
